title: Linda Guinn
compiled_truth: Linda Guinn is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (1980-01-01 to 2001-12-07), Linda Guinn sent 10 and received 556 emails, totalling 566 interactions. Top correspondents: [Richard Sanders](people/richard-sanders) (9), [Paulcooley](people/paulcooley-mail) (2), [Britt Davis](people/britt-davis) (2), [Andrew Edison](people/andrew-edison) (1), [Travis Mccullough](people/travis-mccullough) (1).
